name: Killer Vegetable
short_description: Girl　VS　Vegetables「crisp and fresh」A horror game aiming to conquer vegetables
detailed_description:
"It's a horror game where you gotta conquer vegetables using all sorts of materials.
Let's take home from the talking vegetables

You'll be exploring a house overrun by aggressive vegetables in a first-person shooter perspective. Just a heads up, there's gonna be some jump scares and intense moments, so brace yourself!"
It also makes a very loud noise. You can set it from the Esc button while gaming, but be very careful with the volume settings on your PC.

It is a B-grade game that can be played as a snack.
This game is available for video distribution. I hope you enjoy it.
